type.title: Types of Use
type.noTypes: No types found for selected group.

subtype.title: Sub-Types of Use
subtype.statusDefault: Status will be saved as Active by default.

messages.onlyAlphanumeric: must contain only letters and numbers (no special characters).
messages.allowedChars: can contain letters (any language), numbers, spaces and (. - ,).
messages.allowedEnglishChars: can contain only English letters, numbers, spaces and (. - ,).
messages.allowedShortcutChars: can contain only letters, spaces, '+' and '-' (numbers not allowed).
messages.atLeastOneLetter: must contain at least one letter.
messages.duplicateGroupId: Duplicate group id is not allowed.
messages.duplicateGroupName: Duplicate group name is not allowed.
messages.duplicateTypeId: Duplicate Type Of Use Code is not allowed.
messages.duplicateSubTypeName: Duplicate Sub-Type Name is not allowed.
messages.groupRequired: Type Of Use Group is required.
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
messages.createGroupFailed: Create group failed. Please try again.
messages.fetchGroupsFailed: Failed to fetch groups. Please try again.
messages.updateGroupFailed: Update group failed. Please try again.
messages.deleteGroupFailed: Delete group failed. Please try again.
messages.deleteGroupReferenced: This group cannot be deleted or deactivated because it still has associated types. Please delete all types within this group first.
messages.fetchTypesFailed: Failed to fetch types. Please try again.
messages.createTypeFailed: Create type failed. Please try again.
messages.updateTypeFailed: Update type failed. Please try again.
messages.deleteTypeFailed: Delete type failed. Please try again.
messages.deleteTypeReferenced: This type cannot be deleted or deactivated because it still has associated sub-types. Please delete all sub-types for this type first.
messages.fetchSubTypesFailed: Failed to fetch sub-types. Please try again.
messages.createSubTypeFailed: Create sub-type failed. Please try again.
messages.updateSubTypeFailed: Update sub-type failed. Please try again.
messages.deleteSubTypeFailed: Delete sub-type failed. Please try again.
messages.deleteSubTypeReferenced: This sub-type cannot be deleted or deactivated because it is being used by other records. Please remove all references first.
messages.fetchSubTypeCountsFailed: Failed to fetch sub-type counts. Please try again.
messages.deleteTypeWithSubTypesDescription: The type you want to delete has sub-types. Deleting it will also delete all its sub-types. Are you sure you want to proceed?
messages.deleteGroupWithTypesDescription: The group you want to delete has types associated with it. Deleting this group will also delete ALL its types and their sub-types. This action cannot be undone.
messages.typeHasSubTypes: This type cannot be deleted because it has sub-types. Please delete all sub-types for this type first.
messages.groupHasTypes: This group cannot be deleted because it has types. Please delete all types within this group first.
messages.cannotDeactivateGroup: This group cannot be deactivated because it has active types. Please deactivate or delete all types within this group first.
messages.cannotDeactivateType: This type cannot be deactivated because it has active sub-types. Please deactivate or delete all sub-types for this type first.
